---
id: requests-deletion-of-the-current-user-account
title: "Requests deletion of the current user account"
description: "On Cloud, sends a confirmation email and returns 202; the account is only deleted after the user clicks the confirmation link. On self-hosted, deletes the account immediately when the correct password is supplied."
sidebar_label: "Requests deletion of the current user account"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Requests deletion of the current user account"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/users/me"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



On Cloud, sends a confirmation email and returns 202; the account is only deleted after the user clicks the confirmation link. On self-hosted, deletes the account immediately when the correct password is supplied.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
